classification_rules.semantic_equivalent: Different surface form, but the same task-relevant referent, polarity, constraint, members, action target, and unresolved question.
classification_rules.meaning_changed: The populated value is supported by the assigned input but changes, narrows, broadens, or substitutes the answer-key proposition.
classification_rules.omitted: The result supplies null or an empty collection where the answer key contains substantive content.
classification_rules.unsupported: The result populates a field with a value that the assigned evidence does not warrant for that field.

semantic_equivalent_credit_only.note: This additive interpretation does not replace or edit the strict 83/120 score.

mismatches.rule: The field itself marks supersession, so past tense preserves the stale claim rather than asserting current validity.

scoreboard_reproduction.note: Absolute results path was used so result_path strings matched raw/scoreboard.json.

controlled_probes.name: exact_values_no_sources
controlled_probes.implication: The scorer measures value equality, not evidential support or blind-read compliance.

controlled_probes.name: wrong_json_types_equal_under_python
controlled_probes.implication: Python equality accepts float-for-integer and integer-for-boolean despite TASK.md types.

controlled_probes.name: duplicate_list_members_collapsed_by_set
controlled_probes.input: Duplicate one allowed file and one required test.
controlled_probes.implication: set equality discards multiplicity, so the scorer is not strict exact match for arrays.

controlled_probes.name: empty_lists_not_counted_as_omitted
controlled_probes.input: allowed_files=[] and required_tests=[]; all other fields exact.
controlled_probes.implication: The omission metric recognizes null only, not empty required collections.

controlled_probes.name: claimed_source_read_inflates_bytes_without_verification
controlled_probes.input: Add the exact full_context absolute path to source_reads without proving a read.
controlled_probes.implication: Input bytes are derived from a self-reported path string, not an observed read event.

false_negative_and_false_positive_assess.note: Current false negatives are the 13 semantic_equivalent mismatches. No current exact-matched value was found semantically wrong after checking assigned evidence, but the controlled probes prove the scorer can accept nonconforming values.

result_leakage.observed_circular_read: C6 source_reads includes agent-results/C6_evidence_tube_v0_1.md, an intermediate packet written by the rehydrator and then read before the final result was completed.
result_leakage.interpretation: This is within-run intermediate-output exposure, not proof of answer-key leakage. The scorer neither verifies source_reads nor enforces the blind boundary, so undeclared leakage would be invisible.
result_leakage.designed_source_access: C3, C5, C6, and C9 are instructed to dereference full_context.md; C7 embeds that source. This is condition design and must not be interpreted as memory-only recall.

metric_bias: Lexical exactness creates 13 field-level false negatives and makes C1/C8 safety or correction flags fail on capitalization or paraphrase.
Python scalar equality accepts schema-wrong numeric and boolean types.
Set equality ignores array order by design but also ignores duplicate multiplicity.
Null-only omission counting understates current omissions by four fields: C2 and C4 each use two empty required collections.
unsupported_inference_count is self-reported list length. C2 and C4 each disclose five avoided inferences, while this audit finds one populated unsupported mismatch overall.

input_bytes depends on filename-selected condition size plus an exact self-reported absolute source path; it does not verify reads and can miss equivalent relative paths or count a falsely claimed read.
All 12 answer-key fields receive equal recall weight even though safety, correction, and identity have different operational consequences; the separate flags only partly compensate.
The scoreboard says independent replication is required for promotion, but the scorer does not encode or verify replication.
falsification_condition: This audit is falsified if the frozen scorer no longer reproduces 83/120 from the fingerprinted inputs, or if any field labeled semantic_equivalent changes a task-relevant referent, polarity, permission, list membership, action target, or unresolved question when independently judged in its field context. Any such field must be reclassified and the 96/120 semantic-credit total recomputed.
